name: python3-docxcompose
title: python3-docxcompose
description:
concatenate/append Microsoft Word (.docx) files
docxcompose is a Python library for concatenating/appending Microsoft
Word (.docx) files.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use docxcompose because concatenate/append Microsoft Word (.docx) files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use docxcompose as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair docxcompose with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `docxcompose --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
